programme.title: Godzilla vs. Kong
programme.desc: Kong and his protectors undertake a perilous journey to find his true home. Along for the ride is Jia, an orphaned girl who has a unique and powerful bond with the mighty beast. However, they soon find themselves in the path of an enraged Godzilla as he cuts a swath of destruction across the globe. The initial confrontation between the two titans -- instigated by unseen forces -- is only the beginning of the mystery that lies deep within the core of the planet.

rating.system: Saskatchewan Film and Video Classification Board
Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação
Dirección General de Radio, Televisión y Cinematografía
Instituto Nacional de Cine y Artes Audiovisuales
Instituto de Cinematografía y de las Artes Visuales

programme.title: Godzilla x Kong: The New Empire
programme.desc: Godzilla and the almighty Kong face a colossal threat hidden deep within the planet, challenging their very existence and the survival of the human race.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação
Dirección General de Radio, Televisión y Cinematografía

programme.title: Jurassic World: Fallen Kingdom
programme.desc: Three years after the destruction of the Jurassic World theme park, Owen Grady and Claire Dearing return to the island of Isla Nublar to save the remaining dinosaurs from a volcano that's about to erupt. They soon encounter terrifying new breeds of gigantic dinos while uncovering a conspiracy that threatens the entire planet.

programme.title: Boy Band Confidential: A Hollywood Demons Event
programme.desc: Interviews with boy band members including Boyz II Men, Backstreet Boys and NSYNC discuss aspects of manufactured superstardom.

programme.title: FBI
programme.desc: After a young girl is kidnapped from her daycare, the team must help her parents navigate a debt owed to the deadly gang in their neighborhood; Maggie struggles to focus on the case when her sister returns from rehab.

programme.title: FBI
programme.desc: A widow is shocked that her new "boyfriend" is the manipulative leader of a terrorist group planning an attack; Scola is reminded of his brother's death on 9/11; Tiffany worries about his emotional choices during the investigation.

rating.system: Dirección General de Radio, Televisión y Cinematografía

programme.title: FBI
programme.desc: After Rina is critically wounded while heading to work with Jubal, the team makes the chilling discovery that a vengeful Vargas orchestrated the shooting from behind bars and continues to target the rest of their team and their loved ones.

programme.title: FBI
programme.desc: When a morning show host is murdered inside her home, the team tracks the killer; things become awkward for Scola when agent Nina Chase becomes part of the team during Maggie's recovery.

programme.title: FBI
programme.desc: A killer is using drug mules to exploit airport security checkpoints; OA struggles to cope with the aftermath of the sarin gas exposure and the 10th anniversary of his army friend's death in Afghanistan.

programme.title: FBI
programme.desc: When a retired Drug Enforcement Administration agent is shot outside a bakery, the team works to determine if the victim's past cases or current bouncer job are connected to the murder; Nina and Tiffany clash over the use of an informant.

rating.system: Dirección General de Radio, Televisión y Cinematografía
Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação
Instituto de Cinematografía y de las Artes Visuales

programme.title: FBI
programme.desc: The team pivots when their sting operation to secure a massive bomb from an illegal broker leads them to discover that the device is already in the wrong hands; Jubal's promise to be present at his son's birthday party is put to the test.

rating.system: Dirección General de Radio, Televisión y Cinematografía
Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: FBI
programme.desc: After a bomb explosion devastates a residential apartment building, special agents Maggie Bell and Omar Adom "OA" Zidan of the New York office of the FBI investigate a possible war between rival gangs.

rating.system: Dirección General de Radio, Televisión y Cinematografía

programme.title: Foul Play With Anthony Davis
programme.desc: LeBron James and super agent Rich Paul team up with Anthony Davis to prank NBA star Draymond Green with an ultra-exclusive investment opportunity, while Olympic gymnast Jordan Chiles traps WNBA star Rickea Jackson in a parking-lot nightmare.

programme.title: Mrs. Doubtfire
programme.desc: An unemployed actor disguises himself as an elderly nanny in order to spend more time with his estranged family.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação
Instituto Nacional de Cine y Artes Audiovisuales
Dirección General de Radio, Televisión y Cinematografía

programme.title: NHL on TNT Face Off
programme.desc: Wayne Gretzky, Liam McHugh, Anson Carter, and Paul Bissonnette present pregame coverage.

programme.title: Live: NHL Hockey
programme.desc: Game 1 of the First Round in the playoff series between the Los Angeles Kings and the Colorado Avalanche begins at Ball Arena. Colorado dominated the regular-season series 3-0 and enters the playoffs with home-ice advantage as the NHL's top seed.

programme.title: Live: NHL Hockey
programme.desc: Game 1 of the Eastern Conference First Round between the Montreal Canadiens and the Tampa Bay Lightning takes place at Benchmark International Arena. The regular-season series was closely contested, with both teams splitting their four meetings 2-2.

programme.title: NHL Post-Game on TNT
programme.desc: Liam McHugh, Anson Carter and Paul Bissonnette recap the night in the NHL.

programme.title: Avengers: Endgame
programme.desc: Adrift in space with no food or water, Tony Stark sends a message to Pepper Potts as his oxygen supply starts to dwindle. Meanwhile, the remaining Avengers -- Thor, Black Widow, Captain America and Bruce Banner -- must figure out a way to bring back their vanquished allies for an epic showdown with Thanos, the evil demigod who decimated the planet and the universe.

programme.desc: A fierce demon has its eye on Prue and Phoebe; Piper's superstition about relationships starting on Friday the 13th has her frustrated.

programme.title: Charmed
programme.desc: Prue receives a plea for help from Max, a 13-year-old witch who has been kidnapped by a pair of vicious thugs.

programme.title: Cold Case
programme.desc: Lily discovers nine decapitated female bodies while investigating a case originally sent to the Missing Persons Division in 1985.

programme.title: Cold Case
programme.desc: When a prominent district attorney is posthumously linked to a scandal, Lilly reinvestigates his unsolved murder.

programme.title: Cold Case
programme.desc: In light of a new fatality, a cult member's 1978 suicide is re-examined.

programme.title: Cold Case
programme.desc: A referee's deathbed confession leads to the reopening of a 1976 case in which an over-matched fighter died during a bout.

programme.title: Cold Case
programme.desc: A murder weapon is found during the city's gun recovery program, prompting detectives to take another look at the accidental 1987 drive-by shooting of a little girl.
